x-enumeration-literals.name: Registration Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date and time at which a given organisation was officially registered. (ISO20022)

x-enumeration-literals.name: Establishment Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: Date when the organisation was established. ISO20022

x-enumeration-literals.name: Entity Expiration Date
x-enumeration-literals.description: The date the Legal Entity ceased operation or was merged. ISO20022
